products.intro: JSC Ocher Machine-Building Plant specializes in manufacturing equipment and components for key industries in oilfield equipment and metal structures. The plant delivers products across Russia, CIS countries, and abroad, offering solutions that meet international quality standards.
products.outro: Ocher Machine-Building Plant manufactures products according to GOST standards. All products undergo multiple quality checks. Each item helps improve efficiency and safety at production sites.

oilfield.title: Oilfield equipment
oilfield.lead: OMZ provides comprehensive solutions for oil production equipment manufacturing:
items: Pump rods and couplings: the foundation for reliable pump equipment operation;
Centralizers and auto-couplers: ensure proper assembly and operation of all components;
Seals and rod rotators: effectively protect and control rod movement.

metalwork.title: Metal structures
metalwork.lead: We manufacture metal structures used in a wide range of applications:
items: Structures for buildings and facilities: from small elements to large-scale projects;
Supports and frames for pipelines: essential for infrastructure safety and durability;
Supports for construction and reconstruction of road sections;

formwork.title: Formwork accessories
formwork.lead: Formwork accessories manufactured by JSC Ocher Machine-Building Plant meet high quality and durability standards.
items: End anchors and tie screws: create strong connections between formwork elements, improving overall system reliability;
Three-wing nuts, wedge and rack locks: strengthen connections between structural components, ensuring stability and reliability during use;
Corner panels and reinforced univilkas for props: increase stability and strength of formwork structures for long-term use;

hero.title: ABOUT OMZ
hero.tagline: JSC Ocher Machine-Building Plant — more than two and a half centuries of industrial history and modern production technologies
hero.bgAlt: Background image of the About page

intro.leadAfter: — one of the oldest industrial enterprises in the Urals, focused on foreign economic activity for trading, construction, and oilfield organizations. We support small, medium, and large businesses through reliable production of metal structures, oilfield equipment, and components.
intro.column2: Specialists at Ocher Machine-Building Plant are always ready to study and solve tasks of any complexity. They closely monitor innovative developments and anticipate risks in operating metal structures and oilfield equipment. They develop cost-efficient concepts for metrological supervision of equipment use and condition, reducing costs through measurement complexes, standards, and automated systems for testing and chemical, metallographic, and mechanical analysis of products and raw materials in compliance with GOST, API 11B, TU, and other industry standards.
intro.column3: A unified organization bringing together thousands of international and Russian specialists: analysts, engineers, auditors, system administrators, technologists, mechanics, designers, certified project managers, and lawyers with deep expertise in mechanical engineering, law, mathematics, analytics, physics, and engineering.

fullCycle.title: Full-cycle production facility
fullCycle.paragraph:
JSC Ocher Machine-Building Plant is one of the oldest industrial enterprises in the Urals. The plant combines in-house production capacity, engineering expertise, and quality control to deliver products demanded by the oil and gas, construction, and industrial sectors.

OMZ manufactures equipment and components for companies that value reliability, compliance with standards, stable deliveries, and the ability to produce items to specific technical requirements.

capabilities.subtitle: Modern equipment for precise and stable production

delivery.title: delivery is provided by OMZ transport

p1.part1: Products manufactured at the plant can be received by the customer
p1.part3: OMZ ships most products by rail:
p1.part5: (from 3 to 20 tons depending on order volume).

p2.part1: Rail shipments are made from a junction station,
p2.part3: OMZ has its own siding at the station with a loading/unloading area and a gantry crane,
p2.part4: with a lifting capacity of 10 tons.

notice.part1: For shipping finished products to customers that do not fit standard schemes,
notice.part2: OMZ is ready to develop and approve the required documentation with the railway administration.

cycle.title: FULL CYCLE
cycle.description: From blanks to testing and marking

metal-structures.title: Advanced equipment
metal-structures.description: The laser cutting system receives jobs directly from the process card and helps reduce metal consumption. Plasma cutting equipment, a pipe beveling machine for various diameters, and CNC bending and rolling machines enable high-precision part production.

metal-structures.title: Corrosion-resistant products
metal-structures.description: Finished products are protected with modern coatings. Surfaces are prepared in shot-blasting chambers; paint materials are applied with airless spray units.

metal-structures.title: Non-destructive testing
metal-structures.description: Certified equipment and specialists are used for weld inspection. Experience in manufacturing cooling towers, span structures, masts, process buildings, and pipeline supports.

metal-structures.title: Heavy-duty cranes
metal-structures.description: The shop has 8 overhead cranes with a lifting capacity of up to 10 tonnes.

oilfield-equipment.title: Team of professionals
oilfield-equipment.description: More than 300 highly qualified specialists work in the shop. Production lines are configured for serial and custom manufacture of products of any complexity.

oilfield-equipment.title: Full production cycle
oilfield-equipment.description: From blank preparation and heat treatment to testing and marking — all operations are performed on the plant site without third-party contractors.

oilfield-equipment.title: API and GOST compliance
oilfield-equipment.description: Products undergo incoming, in-process, and acceptance inspection. Compliance documentation and certificates are provided to the customer.

oilfield-equipment.title: Logistics and lead times
oilfield-equipment.description: A streamlined kitting and shipping system enables on-time delivery to remote fields.

building-structures.title: Wide product range
building-structures.description: Tie screws, wedge and toothed locks, nuts, braces, props, and formwork elements — all in one shop.

building-structures.title: Warehouse stock
building-structures.description: We maintain a constant stock of fast-moving items for prompt shipment to construction sites.

building-structures.title: Order flexibility
building-structures.description: Fabrication per standard and custom drawings; batch kitting tailored to the project.

building-structures.title: Quality control
building-structures.description: Geometric dimensions and strength characteristics are checked on every batch.

metal.title: Metal structures workshop
metal.cta: OMZ is a team that values work and helps people grow. Join us!

history.title: Company history
history.intro: Discover the fascinating history of our plant, the path we have taken, and the stages of transformation we have gone through
history.placeholder: Historical materials for {year} are being prepared for publication.

entry1757.p1: At the age of 24, Alexander Sergeyevich Stroganov took responsibility for developing the family business
entry1757.p2: By then, the heir had received an excellent education, including a serious course in studying industrial enterprises in Europe. In 1746, Alexander Sergeyevich's elder uncle, Alexander Grigoryevich Stroganov, built the Yugo-Kamsky plant
entry1757.p3: Drawing on this successful experience, Alexander Sergeyevich accepted manager Fyodor Vaulin's proposal and decided to build a plant in the forest-rich Ocher lands. The bloomery forge of the hammer mill required large amounts of charcoal. All that remained was to create a new factory town in a remote corner of the vast estate

safetyHotline.title: safety line
safetyHotline.reviewNote: Each report will be reviewed carefully; if warranted, an appropriate investigation will be conducted.

p1.part1: To maintain a high level of trust in JSC Ocher Machine-Building Plant,
p1.part2: compliance with international business ethics standards, and as part of the company's policy on detecting and preventing violations and abuses, including corruption and fraud, abuse of position and authority, and countering other offenses
p1.part3: a SAFETY HOTLINE has been established at the company.

p2.part2: you can conveniently report, including anonymously, theft and embezzlement, fraud, bribery, commercial bribery, and conflicts of interest,
p2.part3: as well as other negative events that concern you.

notices.anonymity: Full anonymity and confidentiality are guaranteed to those who provide information.
notices.reward: If reliable information helps prevent damage to the company, a monetary reward is provided under confidentiality terms.

categorySeo.oilfield: Pump rods, polished rods, couplings, centralizers, wellhead seals, and other oilfield equipment. Made by OMZ, GOST compliant.
categorySeo.metalwork: Piles, building metal structures, grade beams, tanks, reservoirs, pipeline supports. Made to customer drawings.
categorySeo.construction: Wedge locks, tie screws, anchors, univilkas, braces, props, and other construction structures for formwork. In-house production.
categorySeo.calibrated: Round calibrated rolled stock of various diameters. High precision and quality standards compliance.
